docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2019 CONTINUED TO JUL-09-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTE: THIS CASE IS SUBJECT TO DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B) IF THERE IS NO APPEARANCE ON THE NEXT HEARING DATE AND COMPLIANCE.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MOHAMMAD SHAKER FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-30-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-17-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. ***SANCTION VACATED ORALLY IN OPEN COURT ON JUL-09-2019.***

CASE DISMISSED BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-09-2019 AT 10:30 AM PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68608(B). THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAKER, MOHAMMAD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

parties.name: SHAKER, MOHAMMAD 1261 EDDY STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. The Apr-30-2019 sanctions is ordered vacated in open court. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2019 Continued To Jul-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance by Self Represented Plaintiff. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Jul-09-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. ***NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance.*** JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk J Lee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2019 Continued To Apr-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Mohammad Shaker, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Apr-30-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
